cookieAuth.name: better-auth.session_token

get.description:
Authentication endpoints powered by BetterAuth:
- POST /sign-up/email - Register with email, password, and name
- POST /sign-in/email - Sign in with email and password
- POST /sign-out - Sign out and invalidate session
- GET /session - Get current session info
- And more (email verification, password reset, etc.)

get.description: Create and manage chat conversations. Supports user and API key authentication.

post.description: Create and manage chat conversations. Supports user and API key authentication.

200.description: Chat created and initial message processed

title.description: Chat title (optional, for manual chat creation). Automatically truncated to 255 chars if longer.

message.description: Initial user query to start the chat (optional)

model.description: AI model to use. Accepts canonical models and legacy model IDs (automatically normalized).

websearch_enable.description: Enable native web search in answer generation.

agent_mode.description: Agent mode for initial message processing: 'quick' for faster responses, 'deep' for full reasoning. Defaults to 'deep'.

post.description: Abort an ongoing streaming chat session. This will immediately stop the current response generation.

200.description: Streaming stopped or no active session

post.description: Runs a lightweight KB-only path: one vector retrieval call, no SQL, no chart generation, then answer agent. Supports optional chunk_count (default 15, max 50).

websearch_enable.description: Enable OpenRouter native web search for answer generation. Defaults to false when omitted.
Enable OpenRouter native web search for answer generation. Defaults to false when omitted.
Enable OpenRouter native web search for answer generation. Defaults to false when omitted.

post.summary: Fast raw query (KB-only, no answer agent)
post.description: Runs one KB retrieval pass only and returns raw grouped chunk payload for custom processing. No SQL and no chart generation.

post.summary: Raw query (returns collected data without generating answer)
post.description: Runs the full main agent pipeline (sneak peek, KB search, SQL queries) but skips the chart agent and answer agent. Returns all data that would have been sent to the answer agent, useful for external processing or custom answer generation. Token usage is tracked and deducted from credits.

200.description: Raw query result with collected data and usage info

get.summary: Get current user profile with organizations
get.description: Returns user profile data for user auth, or API key metadata for API key auth.

200.description: User profile (user auth) or API key context (API key auth)

post.description: Run a non-streaming AI agent that can use built-in tools and developer-provided API tools.

200.description: Agent result with final answer, tool call records, and token usage.

knowledge_base_id.description: Knowledge base ID used for auth, chat context, and billing.

query.description: User query for the dynamic agent

model.description: OpenRouter model to use. Accepts canonical models and legacy model IDs (automatically normalized).

name.description: Tool name exposed to the agent

description.description: Tool description including all parameters expected by the target API

endpoint.description: Tool API endpoint URL. Supports path templates like https://api.example.com/items/{item_id}; placeholders are replaced using runtime tool input fields.

headers.description: HTTP headers sent to the external API. Put auth headers here (e.g. Authorization, x-api-key).

query_params.description: Static query parameters to append to the URL. Dynamic query values should be declared in parameter_schema and passed by the model at runtime.

method.description: HTTP method for this tool request

max_retries.description: Maximum retries for failed API calls

max_calls.description: Maximum number of times this specific external tool can be called in one agent run.

timeout_ms.description: Per-tool request timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 300000 (5 minutes) when omitted.

parameter_schema.description: Input parameter schema for this tool

search_knowledge_base.description: Max calls for internal searchKnowledgeBase tool in one run.

query_database.description: Max calls for internal queryDatabase tool in one run.

generate_chart.description: Max calls for internal generateChart tool in one run.

websearch_enable.description: Enable OpenRouter native web search plugin for this agent run.

additional_instructions.description: Additional system instructions for this run

max_steps.description: Global maximum reasoning/tool steps for this run (across all internal and external tools).
